Substitutes variables from tfvars
Writes install-config.yaml to disk

div.div:
null_resource + file provisioner
Connects to bastion via SSH
Uploads generated config files
Uses SCP (Secure Copy Protocol)

div.div:
null_resource + remote-exec
openshift-baremetal-install create cluster
Powers on 6 physical servers via BMC/IPMI
Boots RHCOS, forms etcd, installs OCP

div.div:
null_resource + remote-exec (post-install)
oc apply -f - for each module:
Namespaces, Secrets, ConfigMaps
StatefulSets, Deployments, Services
Routes, Operators, CRDs

console_url = https://console-openshift-...
api_url = https://api.ocp.example.com:6443
kubeconfig_path = /opt/openshift/auth/kubeconfig
cluster_name = ocp-baremetal-dc
bastion_host = 10.142.41.10
